acceptanceCriteria.criterion: No-slot events consume no Attempt or retry budget
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Capacity entries remove retry state while retaining the current attempt identity.
State, recovery membership, priority and creation-time ordering are tested across restart reconstruction.
Delivery state ranking places merging, rework and running before ready work.
API, terminal and LiveView expose count, position, reason and state.
311 tests, 0 failures, 2 intentional skips, 100 percent coverage, Credo and Dialyzer clean.

summary: Execution capacity is now an ordered observable queue, never an artificial retry failure.
